commit_dialog.description: { bookCount } book{{s}} will be removed from your stock

stock_adjustement_detail.summary: Some quantities requested are greater than available in stock. Please review the following stock adjustments:

force_withdrawal_dialog.title: Force withdrawal for {isbn:string}?
force_withdrawal_dialog.description: This book is out of stock. If you're certain additional copies exist, you can manually select a warehouse to force the withdrawal.
force_withdrawal_dialog.selected_warehouse_message: A stock adjustment will be recorded for {quantity:number} {{copy|copies}} of {isbn:string} in {displayName:string}.

placeholder.scan_description: Plugin your barcode scanner and pull the trigger

alerts.insufficient_quantity: The warehouse you're attempting to assign to has no more available quantity, click Force Withdrawal to select another warehouse
alerts.no_warehouse_selected_commit_self: Please make sure all items have an assigned warehouse.

labels.get_started: Get started by adding a new sale

commit_dialog.title: Commit purchase "{entity}"?
commit_dialog.description: { bookCount } book{{s}} will be added to { warehouseName }

placeholder.scan_description: Plugin your barcode scanner and pull the trigger

headings.demo_reset: Reset the DB to initial state ?

descriptions.sync_settings: Manage DB name, sync URL and the connection. Note: This will be merged with DB selection in the future
descriptions.db_management: Use this section to create, select, import, export or delete a database
descriptions.import: Drag and drop your .sqlite3 file here to import
descriptions.demo_reset_1: Click on the button below to reset the DB to initial state
descriptions.demo_reset_2: All changes made will be lost and the DB will be reset to initial demo state.

delete_dialog.title: Permenantly delete {entity}?
delete_dialog.description: Once you delete this note, you will not be able to access it again

delete_warehouse_dialog.description: Once you delete this warehouse { bookCount } book{{s}} will be removed from your stock

delete_database_dialog.description: Once you delete this database it can't be restored. In order to save the backup first, please use the export button.

delete_supplier_dialog.description: This will permanently delete this supplier and remove all publisher associations.

create_database_dialog.title: Create new database
create_database_dialog.description: Please type in the name for the new database

placeholder.title: There are no pending supplier orders
placeholder.description: Create customer orders to generate supplier orders

stats.no_order_format: Order format needs to be configured

placeholder.description: Scan or enter the ISBNs of the delivered books to begin reconciliation.

delete_dialog.title: Delete Reconciliation Order
delete_dialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this reconciliation order? This action will delete all the scanned lines.

reassign_publisher.title: Re-assign publisher
reassign_publisher.description: Are you sure you want to remove {publisher} from its previous supplier and assign it to {supplier}?

commit_dialog.heading: Finalize reconciliation order
commit_dialog.delivered_book_count: { deliveredBookCount } books will be marked as delivered (and ready to be collected)
commit_dialog.rejected_book_count: { rejectedBookCount } books will be marked as rejected (waiting for reordering)

label.aria: Select a warehouse to withdraw book {rowIx:number} from

description.in_progress: The initial DB sync is in progress. This might take a while
description.warning: Please don't navigate away while the sync is in progress as it will result in broken DB and the sync will need to be restarted.

demo_db_not_initialised.title: Load the DB with data
demo_db_not_initialised.call_to_action: Click on the button below to load the DB prepupulated with demo data
demo_db_not_initialised.description: This will download the demo DB .sqlite3 file and store it to browser's OPFS (for in app usage)

schema_mismatch.title: Error: DB Schema mismatch
schema_mismatch.description: Your DB's schema version doesn't match the latest schema version. Click automigrate to migrate to the latest version.

corrupted.title: Error: DB corrupted
corrupted.description: The only way to use the app seems to be to delete it and start fresh.
corrupted.note: Note: This won't resync the database. If you want to sync up the DB with the remote one, please do so on the settings page (after reinitialisation)

runtime_error_toast.title: An unexpected error occurred
runtime_error_toast.description: If it persists, try reloading the page.

message.title: Something crashed!
message.description: Try checking your internet connection if you're using an online database.

empty_database.title: No results
empty_database.description: Book database is empty. Start by adding some books to stock.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Visual runtime snapshot for connection, compatibility, queue, and local DB health.

checks.title: Checks
checks.description: Run explicit diagnostics and export current sync troubleshooting data.

recovery.title: Recovery
recovery.description: Use the least destructive fix first.

inject_problems.title: Inject Problems
inject_problems.description: Force failures to test resilience and recovery flows.

data_tools.title: Data Tools
data_tools.description: Seed/reset/export helpers, table exploration, and custom query execution.

freshness.title: Freshness
freshness.description: Freshness indicates how recent sync signals are. Each metric shows explicit thresholds and a state: Healthy, Warning, Stale, or N/A.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.no_changes: No changes recorded in this session yet.

health_rail.description: Core sync health metrics. These values summarize transport, compatibility, local DB condition, pending write pressure, and automatic recovery behavior.
health_rail.derived_transport: Derived from sync transport events and stuck detection.
health_rail.derived_transport_other_tab: Derived from sync transport events and stuck detection; heartbeat currently comes from another tab.
health_rail.derived_compatibility: Derived from local/remote identity and schema checks.
health_rail.derived_local_db: Derived from local database health checks.
health_rail.derived_auto_recovery: Derived from automatic stale-state recovery attempts.

freshness.status_description: Transport keepalive liveness (WebSocket ping/pong), independent from pending writes.
freshness.ack_description: Age of last server acknowledgment while queue has pending writes.
freshness.queue_description: Age of oldest unsent local change.

recheck_sync_compatibility.title: Recheck sync compatibility
recheck_sync_compatibility.description: Runs the strict local-vs-remote identity check and refreshes compatibility state.

run_db_quick_check.title: Run DB quick check
run_db_quick_check.description: Fast structural check of local SQLite integrity for routine diagnostics.

run_db_integrity_check.title: Run DB integrity check
run_db_integrity_check.description: Deeper integrity scan. Slower; use when you suspect corruption.

run_connection_probe.title: Run connection probe
run_connection_probe.description: Checks sync meta endpoint and a direct WebSocket open to diagnose timeout issues.

run_handshake_status_check.title: Run handshake status check
run_handshake_status_check.description: Reads the latest worker sync.status payload (stage, reason, acknowledgment version).

run_sync_config_sanity.title: Check sync URL/config sanity
run_sync_config_sanity.description: Validates DB ID, sync URL format, protocol, and derived meta URL.

restart_sync_worker.title: Restart sync worker
restart_sync_worker.description: Stops and starts the sync worker to recover from temporary worker/network issues.

reset_compatibility_identity.title: Reset compatibility identity
reset_compatibility_identity.description: Clears remembered remote site ID for this DB and re-runs strict compatibility checks.

run_manual_auto_recovery.title: Run manual auto-recovery
run_manual_auto_recovery.description: Runs quick DB check + strict compatibility check and restarts sync if stale/blocked.

nuke_and_resync_now.title: Nuke and resync now
nuke_and_resync_now.description: Destructive: deletes local DB and re-downloads state from remote.

inject_sync_transport_failure.title: Inject sync transport failure
inject_sync_transport_failure.description: Temporarily points sync to an unreachable URL to force connection errors. Run again to restore.

corrupt_local_site_identity.title: Corrupt local site identity
corrupt_local_site_identity.description: Writes a random value into local crsql_site_id and remembered identity to force compatibility mismatch.

trigger_load_error.title: Trigger load error
trigger_load_error.description: Navigates to the load error route to test error-state handling.

trigger_runtime_error.title: Trigger runtime error
trigger_runtime_error.description: Throws a runtime exception for testing crash/error boundaries.

export_state.title: Export state
export_state.description: Exports current local app state archive for debugging.

export_sync_diagnostics.title: Export sync diagnostics
export_sync_diagnostics.description: Downloads runtime sync diagnostics JSON (also copied to clipboard when allowed).

populate_database.title: Populate database
populate_database.description: Inserts debug seed data for quick local testing.

upsert_100_books.title: Upsert 100 books
upsert_100_books.description: Adds deterministic sample books and publisher/supplier links.

reset_database.title: Reset database
reset_database.description: Destructive: deletes all rows from core local business tables (books, customers, suppliers, orders).

timeline_events.check_config_sanity_issues: Check: sync config sanity found {count:number} issue(s)

dialogs.confirm_reset_database: This deletes all rows from core local tables used by the app. Continue?
dialogs.confirm_nuke_resync: This will delete the local DB and re-sync from remote. Continue?

status_messages.no_sync_status_timeout: No sync.status event received within timeout.

sanity_problems.sync_url_protocol_invalid: Sync URL protocol must be ws/wss (got {protocol:string}).
sanity_problems.sync_url_invalid: Sync URL is not a valid URL.
sanity_problems.meta_url_derive_failed: Could not derive meta URL from sync URL + DB ID.

notifications.copy_failed_probe: Could not copy probe result to clipboard.
notifications.copy_failed_config: Could not copy sync config sanity result.
notifications.copy_failed_handshake: Could not copy handshake status check result.
notifications.local_identity_corrupted_desc: Updated crsql_site_id and remembered identity. Compatibility should turn incompatible.
notifications.corrupt_identity_failed_desc: Could not mutate local site identity.
notifications.compat_identity_reset_desc: Cleared remembered remote site identity and re-ran strict compatibility check.
notifications.reset_identity_failed_desc: Could not reset remembered compatibility identity.
notifications.sync_disabled_inject_desc: Enable sync first to inject transport failures.
notifications.sync_disabled_manual_recovery_desc: Enable sync first to run manual auto-recovery.
notifications.sync_disabled_restart_desc: Enable sync first to restart the sync worker.
notifications.db_quick_check_failed_desc: Could not run local DB quick_check.
notifications.db_integrity_check_failed_desc: Could not run local DB integrity_check.
notifications.compat_check_passed_desc: Local and remote sync compatibility is valid.
notifications.compat_check_failed_desc: Local and remote sync compatibility did not pass.
notifications.compat_check_failed_run_desc: Could not run strict compatibility check.
notifications.connection_probe_passed_desc: Meta endpoint and WebSocket transport are reachable.
notifications.connection_probe_issues_desc: Check probe details in the Checks section.
notifications.probe_copied_desc: Connection probe JSON copied to clipboard.
notifications.sync_config_copied_desc: Sync config sanity result copied to clipboard.
notifications.handshake_status_copied_desc: Handshake status check result copied to clipboard.
notifications.sync_errors_copied_desc: Recent sync errors copied to clipboard.
notifications.sync_errors_cleared_desc: Recent sync runtime errors were cleared.
notifications.handshake_status_unavailable_desc: Transport is disconnected. Reconnect or run a recovery action first.
notifications.handshake_status_check_failed_desc: Could not read worker sync.status payload.
notifications.sync_config_sanity_passed_desc: Sync URL, DB ID, and derived meta URL look valid.
notifications.sync_config_sanity_issues_desc: {count:number} issue(s) found. See details in Checks section.
notifications.sync_config_sanity_failed_desc: Could not run config sanity checks.
notifications.manual_auto_recovery_applied_desc: Performed checks and restarted sync worker.
notifications.manual_auto_recovery_not_needed_desc: Checks passed; no restart was required.
notifications.diagnostics_exported_desc: Sync diagnostics JSON downloaded and copied to clipboard when permitted.
notifications.resync_started_desc: Local DB was reset and remote resync has started.
notifications.nuke_resync_failed_desc: Could not reset local DB and start resync.

labels.database_name: Database Name (this will probably change in the future)

labels.title: Title
labels.out_of_print_help: This book is no longer available from the publisher

validation.display_id_not_unique: This ID is already in use by customer "{fullname}" with {bookCount} ordered book{{s}}
